rows.label: qev085904_MSG0001
rows.name: Sigh... After we went through all the trouble to get it...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085904_MSG0002
rows.name: To think it can't be processed. What a shock.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085904_MSG0003
rows.name: Even if it's impossible for Earthlings, an alien might be able to pull it off.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085904_MSG0004
rows.name: I met a Ma-non the other day who's an artisan in ore processing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085904_MSG0005
rows.name:
He's a greedy old man, but his skills are apparently top-notch.
Shall I introduce you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085904_MSG0008
rows.name: Seems you've been putting in a lot of hard work for the sake of my team member.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085904_MSG0011
rows.name: Let me help out from here on.[ST:wait ]
